message:
fix(node): do not count queued-promotion bulkhead overload as lane rejection

When a queued operation attempts promotion but the global bulkhead is
temporarily full, the operation stays in the queue — this should not
increment the lane's rejected metric since the request was never
refused from the caller's perspective. Add a count_lane_rejection flag
to acquire_bulkhead so that only fresh assignment rejections are counted,
while queued promotions that fail bulkhead acquisition silently remain
queued. Includes regression test covering the tightened-bulkhead
promotion path across timed/cancel/realtime lanes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
